azure_blob_storage_endpoint_domain_name.description: OneLake uses a fixed endpoint. Leave default for Microsoft Fabric OneLake.
azure_blob_storage_endpoint_domain_name.title: Azure Storage Endpoint Domain Name

azure_blob_storage_account_name.description: The name or GUID of your Microsoft Fabric workspace. Use GUID if the name has spaces.
azure_blob_storage_account_name.title: Fabric Workspace Name or GUID

azure_blob_storage_container_name.description: The Lakehouse (or Fabric item) that will receive the data. E.g. 'MyLakehouse.Lakehouse' or 'lakehouse_raw'.
azure_blob_storage_container_name.title: Lakehouse Item Path

shared_access_signature.description: Not used for OneLake. Leave empty.
shared_access_signature.title: Shared Access Signature

azure_blob_storage_account_key.description: Not used for OneLake. Leave empty.
azure_blob_storage_account_key.title: Azure Blob Storage Account Key

azure_tenant_id.description: The Azure Active Directory (Entra ID) tenant ID. Required for Entra ID authentication.
azure_tenant_id.title: Azure Tenant ID

azure_client_id.description: The Azure Active Directory (Entra ID) client ID. Required for Entra ID authentication.
azure_client_id.title: Azure Client ID

use_managed_identity.description: Use the Azure Managed Identity of the host (e.g. Airbyte runner) instead of Service Principal. Requires the identity to have Storage Blob Data Contributor (or similar) on the Fabric workspace.
use_managed_identity.title: Use Managed Identity

managed_identity_client_id.description: For user-assigned Managed Identity, set this to the identity's client ID. Leave empty for system-assigned.
managed_identity_client_id.title: Managed Identity Client ID (optional)

azure_blob_storage_spill_size.description: The amount of megabytes after which the connector should spill to a new blob. Enter 0 if not applicable.
azure_blob_storage_spill_size.title: Target Object Size (MB)

destination_path_format.description: Format of the output directory inside the Lakehouse Files section. Variables: ${NAMESPACE}, ${STREAM_NAME}, etc. Leave empty for default.
destination_path_format.title: Output Path Format

file_name_pattern.description: Pattern for output file names. Variables: {date}, {timestamp}, {part_number}, {format_extension}. Leave empty for default.
file_name_pattern.title: File Name Pattern

azure_client_secret.description: The Azure Active Directory (Entra ID) client secret. Required when Use Managed Identity is off. Enter after Tenant ID and Client ID.
azure_client_secret.title: Azure Client Secret
